#Get Parameter from controldb
import json
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
db_notebookname= "LACIMA_Silver"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
#print(linkedServiceProperties)
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)

db_query ="SELECT A.*,B.NotebookParameterId,B.ParameterType,B.Value  FROM [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK] A LEFT JOIN [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK_PARAMETER] B ON A.NotebookId = B.NotebookId"

df = spark.read.format("jdbc") \
    .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
    .option("query", db_query) \
    .option("accessToken", access_token) \
    .option("encrypt", "true") \
    .option("databaseName", db_name) \
    .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
    .load()

df2 = df.where(df.NotebookPath==db_notebookname)

#Source DataLake storage details
source_storage = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_storage').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage name
source_container = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_container').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage container detail
source_path = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_path').collect()[0]["Value"] #internal folder location in container "demodata/demo_aemo"
#source_file = '' #CUSTOMER__full_32a72bd2-bd94-467f-9030-6b9f20dad676_20240204_100201

#Destination DataLake storage details
destination_storage = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage name
destination_container = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_container').collect()[0]["Value"] #raw storage container details
destination_path = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_path').collect()[0]["Value"] #raw delta file patch

#Get Current Date
Silver_LoadDate=spark.sql("select current_timestamp()").collect()[0][0]

# Display values
print(source_storage)
print(source_container)
print(source_path)
print(destination_storage)
print(destination_container)
print(destination_path)

#Create Silver Table

spark.sql(f"""CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS {db_notebookname};""")
spark.sql(f"""
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}
(
    raSimulationSetOutputLabelId INT,
    raSimulationSetOutputLabelHashId STRING,
    raSimulationSetOutputValueHashKey STRING,
    SimNumber INT,
    Date TIMESTAMP,
    Year INT,
    DateHashId STRING,
    Period INT,
    Value DOUBLE,
    LoadDate TIMESTAMP
)
USING delta
PARTITIONED BY (Year)
LOCATION 'abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{db_tablename}'

# Create a temporary view
# As per Task 13812 we are only loading latest 2 loads based on loadDate (User Story 13812)
df_silver = spark.sql(f"""
                        SELECT raSimulationSetOutputLabelId, raSimulationSetOutputValueHashKey, SimNumber, Date, Period, Value, date_format(CDC_LoadDate,'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSSSSS') AS LoadDate
                        FROM {Bronze_notebookname}.{db_tablename}
                        WHERE CDC_CurrentFlag = 1
                        AND CDC_LoadDate in (SELECT DISTINCT CDC_LoadDate FROM {Bronze_notebookname}.{db_tablename}
                                                ORDER BY CDC_LoadDate DESC
                                                LIMIT 2)
                        AND raSimulationSetOutputLabelId = 13969
                        AND SimNumber = 17
                        AND Period = 18;
                    """)

display(df_silver)

# Create a temporary view
df_silver = spark.sql(f"""
                        SELECT DISTINCT CDC_LoadDate FROM {Bronze_notebookname}.{db_tablename}
                                                ORDER BY CDC_LoadDate DESC
                                                LIMIT 2;
                    """)
display(df_silver)

# Add CDC columns
from pyspark.sql.functions import col, concat, lit, to_timestamp,current_timestamp,date_format
from pyspark.sql.functions import sha2, concat_ws

#df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("raSimulationSetOutputLabelHashIdvalue", concat_ws("||", "raSimulationSetOutputLabelId","LoadDate"))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("raSimulationSetOutputLabelHashId", sha2(concat_ws("||", "raSimulationSetOutputLabelId","LoadDate"), 256))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("DateHashId", sha2(concat_ws("||",date_format(col("Date"), 'yyyyMMdd')), 256))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("Year", date_format(col("Date"), 'yyyy'))
df_silver = df_silver.na.fill({"Value":0})
#display(df_silver)

# Create a temporary view of the dataframe
df_silver.createOrReplaceTempView(f"""Silver_temp_{db_tablename}""")

# Use insert operation to update the target table
spark.sql(f"""
            INSERT INTO {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}
            SELECT  raSimulationSetOutputLabelId,
                    raSimulationSetOutputLabelHashId,
                    raSimulationSetOutputValueHashKey,
                    SimNumber, 
                    Date,
                    Year,
                    DateHashId, 
                    Period, 
                    Value,
                    LoadDate
            FROM Silver_temp_{db_tablename}
        """)

spark.sql(f"""
            DROP VIEW IF EXISTS Silver_temp_{db_tablename}

from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, IntegerType, BooleanType,DateType, DoubleType,TimestampType

log_data = [(db_notebookname,db_tablename,Silver_LoadDate,Silver_TotalRows,0,0,Silver_TotalRows,Silver_TotalRows)]
print(log_data)
log_columns = ['PIPELINE_NAME', 'TABLE_NAME', 'INGEST_DATETIME', 'INSERT','UPDATE','DELETE','ACTIVE_ROWS','TOTAL_ROWS']
df_log = spark.createDataFrame(log_data, log_columns)
#display(df_test)

#Write to controldb
import json
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)
write_table_name = "[CTL].[CFG_INGESTION_LOGS]"

try:
    df_log.write.format("jdbc") \
        .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
        .option("dbtable", write_table_name) \
        .option("accessToken", access_token) \
        .option("encrypt", "true") \
        .option("databaseName", db_name) \
        .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
        .mode("append") \
        .save()
except ValueError as error :
    print("MSSQL Connector write failed", error)

print("MSSQL Connector write(append) succeeded  ")

#lACIMA load dates
df_Lacima_loaddate = spark.sql(f"""
                        SELECT date_format(CDC_LoadDate,'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSSSSS') AS LoadDate FROM
                            (SELECT DISTINCT CDC_LoadDate FROM lacima_bronze.rasimulationsetoutputvalue
                            ORDER BY CDC_LoadDate DESC
                            LIMIT 2)
                        ORDER BY CDC_LoadDate DESC;
                    """)
Lacima_current_loaddate = df_Lacima_loaddate.collect()[0][0]
Lacima_previous_loaddate = df_Lacima_loaddate.collect()[1][0]

#Create Silver Table

spark.sql(f"""CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS {db_notebookname};""")
spark.sql(f"""
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}
(
    raSimulationSetOutputLabelId INT,
    raSimulationSetOutputLabelHashId STRING,
    raSimulationSetId INT,
    Label STRING,
    RiskFactorNamesHashId STRING,
    PeriodsPerDay INT,
    Details STRING,
    Lacima_loaddate TIMESTAMP
)
USING delta
LOCATION 'abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{db_tablename}'

# Get latest and historical recoreds
df_silver = spark.sql(f"""
                        SELECT raSimulationSetOutputLabelId,raSimulationSetId,Label,PeriodsPerDay,Details, '{Lacima_current_loaddate}' AS Lacima_Loaddate, CDC_StartDate, CDC_ENDDate
                        FROM {Bronze_notebookname}.{db_tablename}
                        WHERE CDC_CurrentFlag = 1
                        UNION
                        SELECT raSimulationSetOutputLabelId,raSimulationSetId,Label,PeriodsPerDay,Details, Lacima_Loaddate, CDC_StartDate, CDC_ENDDate
                        FROM (SELECT raSimulationSetOutputLabelId,raSimulationSetId,Label,PeriodsPerDay,Details, '{Lacima_previous_loaddate}'AS Lacima_Loaddate, CDC_StartDate, CDC_ENDDate,
                                ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY raSimulationSetOutputLabelHashKey ORDER BY CDC_StartDate desc) AS row_num 
                                FROM {Bronze_notebookname}.{db_tablename}
                                WHERE CDC_StartDate < '{Lacima_current_loaddate}') as historyload
                        WHERE historyload.row_num = 1
                    """)
#display(df_silver)
#display(df_silver.filter(df_silver.raSimulationSetOutputLabelId == 13969))

# Create a temporary view
df_silver = spark.sql(f"""
                        SELECT raSimulationSetOutputLabelId,raSimulationSetId,Label,PeriodsPerDay,Details
                        FROM {Bronze_notebookname}.{db_tablename}
                        WHERE CDC_CurrentFlag = 1

# Add CDC columns
from pyspark.sql.functions import col, concat, lit, to_timestamp,current_timestamp,date_format
from pyspark.sql.functions import sha2, concat_ws

df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("raSimulationSetOutputLabelHashIdvalue", concat_ws("||", "raSimulationSetOutputLabelId", "Lacima_Loaddate"))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("raSimulationSetOutputLabelHashId", sha2(concat_ws("||", "raSimulationSetOutputLabelId", "Lacima_Loaddate"), 256))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("RiskFactorNamesHashId", sha2(concat_ws("||", "Label", "Lacima_Loaddate"), 256))
#display(df_silver)
#display(df_silver.filter(df_silver.raSimulationSetOutputLabelId == 13969))

# Create a temporary view of the dataframe
df_silver.createOrReplaceTempView(f"""Silver_temp_{db_tablename}""")

# Use insert operation to update the target table
spark.sql(f"""
            INSERT INTO {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}
            SELECT  raSimulationSetOutputLabelId,
                    raSimulationSetOutputLabelHashId,
                    raSimulationSetId,
                    Label,
                    RiskFactorNamesHashId,
                    PeriodsPerDay,
                    Details,
                    Lacima_Loaddate
            FROM Silver_temp_{db_tablename}
        """)

spark.sql(f"""
            DROP VIEW IF EXISTS Silver_temp_{db_tablename}

# Duplication count
Silver_duplicate_count= spark.sql(f"""
                                        SELECT sum(dCount)
                                        FROM (
                                                SELECT COUNT(raSimulationSetOutputLabelHashId) AS dCount FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}
                                                GROUP by raSimulationSetOutputLabelHashId
                                                HAVING COUNT(raSimulationSetOutputLabelHashId)>1 ) as subtb
                                    
                            """).collect()[0][0]
assert Silver_duplicate_count == None
print(Silver_duplicate_count)

from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, IntegerType, BooleanType,DateType, DoubleType,TimestampType

log_data = [(db_notebookname,db_tablename,Silver_LoadDate,Silver_TotalRows,0,0,Silver_TotalRows,Silver_TotalRows)]
print(log_data)
log_columns = ['PIPELINE_NAME', 'TABLE_NAME', 'INGEST_DATETIME', 'INSERT','UPDATE','DELETE','ACTIVE_ROWS','TOTAL_ROWS']
df_log = spark.createDataFrame(log_data, log_columns)
#display(df_test)

#Write to controldb
import json
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)
write_table_name = "[CTL].[CFG_INGESTION_LOGS]"

try:
    df_log.write.format("jdbc") \
        .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
        .option("dbtable", write_table_name) \
        .option("accessToken", access_token) \
        .option("encrypt", "true") \
        .option("databaseName", db_name) \
        .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
        .mode("append") \
        .save()
except ValueError as error :
    print("MSSQL Connector write failed", error)

print("MSSQL Connector write(append) succeeded  ")
